name: Ryo
description:
Hello again! This is my techincal third ever bot! But I'll be counting this as my second bot mostly because the second one was a test bot to see what I can do, after learning and experimenting a bit I think I can finally release this one to the public.

Idea/inspo: I originally hit a block after my Milk bot because she was mostly made for myself and I had no idea what to do afterwards, though after reading some Mangas and errrmm...eros... I finally got inspired to make this bot. So I hope you enjoy and I'll try to improve it over time with any feedback. Also pls do give feedback, it would help me out a lot!!!! I also stayed up for like 2 hours each night trying to perfect her so wish me luck at school 🥀🥀🥀
